main.description: Gift a seed. The caller must be signed in and must be the grantee of `grantor`; publishing passes that seed's planting right on to `grantee` as a new child seed. The AppView writes an ink.branchline.seed record to the caller's PDS and mirrors it into the local read cache. Root (grantor-less) seeds are not created through this endpoint — they are authored only by the branchline.ink repo.

grantor.description: AT-URI of the seed the caller currently holds as grantee.

grantee.description: DID of the new grantee receiving the gift.

expiresAt.description: Optional expiry for the new grant. Must not extend past the grantor chain's earliest expiry.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: The caller is not signed in.

errors.name: GrantorNotFound
errors.description: The grantor seed does not exist in the AppView.

errors.name: NotGrantee
errors.description: The caller is not the grantee of the grantor seed.

errors.name: GrantorExpired
errors.description: The grantor seed's expiry has passed.

errors.name: GrantorAlreadyGranted
errors.description: The grantor seed has already been granted to another recipient.
